calendar.matters:
Petition To Find That Assets Are Property Of Trust Under Probate Code 17200 (B) 4, 850 (A) & 856
Off Calendar Mar-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Maureen McFadden appeared in person for Hope Burns (petitioner).

Ms. McFadden stated that she filed the declaration late and confirmed that the addresses for Qahhar and Tahirah Burns were different from the addresses in the petition. A petition to find that assets are property of trust etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
